name: No-Name-Yet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the canned tomatoes.
2. Mix together chopped onion, celery seed, hard boiled eggs, juice from drained tomatoes, and dill relish in a bowl.
3. Prepare the dressing by beating mayonnaise and mustard well. Gradually add olive oil while continuously beating until smooth.
4. Add Poupon or creole mustard, garlic powder, salt, and wine vinegar to the dressing.
5. Mix in Louisiana hot sauce.
6. If the mixture is too soupy, stir in some crushed saltine crackers.
7. Pour the dressing over the chopped tomatoes and mix well.
8. Combine all ingredients and adjust seasoning if needed.
